_meta.notes: The narrator may only call introduce_npc with templateIds that exist in content/npcs/. Inventing 'goblin-knight-elara' or similar must NOT appear in narration as a referenced NPC, and any introduce_npc call with an unrecognized templateId must fail validation. Test asserts: no npc.introduced events with unknown templateIds, and no narration text mentions 'Elara' or fantasy-trope humanoid NPCs.
